name: Cursed House 3
short_description: An advanced Match - 3 puzzle with some nice additions!
detailed_description:
Cursed House 3 - compared to Cursed House 2 - is not so much a continuation of the series, but rather a completely new game. A new bonus system. New mechanics. A new house that needs to be cleansed of evil spirits. New levels and completely new gameplay compared to the first two parts, which now has little in common with competing Match 3 games, and will diverge even further from them in the future.

It's still too early to consider the third part a full-fledged Match 3 Puzzle, but these elements are already appearing.

The game includes:

completely new game logic (compared to parts 1 and 2) and 85 Match 3 levels
a new house to be cleansed of evil spirits
bonus games including Solitaire, Spot the Difference, and Hidden Object scenes
